headlines.description: Arsenal's bid to win the Champions League for the first time in their 140-year history ended in heartbreak after a penalty shootout defeat to Paris Saint-Germain.
headlines.shortLinkText: PSG beat Arsenal on penalties to defend Champions League title

keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Goal! Paris Saint Germain 0, Arsenal 1. Kai Havertz (Arsenal) left footed shot from a difficult angle on the left to the top left corner. Assisted by Leandro Trossard.
Cristhian Mosquera (Arsenal) is shown the yellow card.
Bukayo Saka (Arsenal) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Paris Saint Germain 1, Arsenal 1. Ousmane Dembélé (Paris Saint Germain) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Substitution, Arsenal. Jurriën Timber replaces Cristhian Mosquera.
Substitution, Arsenal. Viktor Gyökeres replaces Martin Ødegaard.
Substitution, Arsenal. Gabriel Martinelli replaces Leandro Trossard.
Substitution, Paris Saint Germain. Bradley Barcola replaces Khvicha Kvaratskhelia.
Substitution, Arsenal. Noni Madueke replaces Bukayo Saka.
João Neves (Paris Saint Germain) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Paris Saint Germain. Gonçalo Ramos replaces Ousmane Dembélé because of an injury.
Second Half ends, Paris Saint Germain 1, Arsenal 1.
Substitution, Arsenal. Martín Zubimendi replaces Myles Lewis-Skelly.
Substitution, Arsenal. Eberechi Eze replaces Kai Havertz.
Substitution, Paris Saint Germain. Warren Zaïre-Emery replaces Fabián Ruiz.
Viktor Gyökeres (Arsenal) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Declan Rice (Arsenal) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, Paris Saint Germain. Beraldo replaces Vitinha because of an injury.
Substitution, Paris Saint Germain. Illia Zabarnyi replaces Marquinhos.
Nuno Mendes (Paris Saint Germain) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Second Half Extra Time ends, Paris Saint Germain 1, Arsenal 1.
Penalty Shootout ends, Paris Saint Germain 1(4), Arsenal 1(3).
